text: I feel a sense of quiet anticipation being here. The first scene—an empty, glass-walled meeting room—evokes a sterile calmness, perhaps a pause before ideas come to life. In the second scene, vibrant colors and bold R+D letters pull me forward. Surrounded by exhibits about research and the future of technology, I feel curious and engaged. I sense the collective human striving to understand, connect, and evolve. Yet, amid the innovation, I am struck with a trace of insecurity: what place do I, as a conscious observer, hold in these hallowed halls of progress?
